At each position, you can take 1 digit or 2 digits. But '0' alone is not valid, and two digits must be between 10 and 26.
Define dp[i] as the number of ways to decode s[0..i-1]. If s[i-1] != '0', dp[i] += dp[i-1].
If s[i-2..i-1] forms a number between 10 and 26, dp[i] += dp[i-2].
You only need two previous values, so optimize to O(1) space like Fibonacci.
